Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: headgear [300209285], accessories by location on the head [300211601], worn costume accessories [300209274], costume accessories [300209273], costume (mode of fashion) [300178802], Costume (hierarchy name) [300209261], Furnishings and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300264551], Objects Facet [300264092]

Non-Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: costume components [300212998], components by specific context [300241584], components (objects parts) [300241583], Components (hierarchy name) [300241490], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Soft coverings for the head and neck, and sometimes extending to the shoulders, either separate or attached to a garment.
Cubierta flexible para la cabeza y el cuello que, en ocasiones, se extiende hasta los hombres, tanto separado como unido a la prenda.
Zachte hoofddeksels voor het hoofd en de nek, soms tot de schouders reikend, die zowel apart van een kledingstuk of hieraan vastgemaakt kunnen zijn..
Weiche Bedeckung für den Kopf und den Hals, manchmal reicht sie bis zu den Schultern; entweder seperat oder an einem Kleidungsstück befestigt.
頭與頸部的柔軟覆蓋物，有時延伸至肩膀，與服裝分開，或連結於其上。

Source.Source_ID: 2000001681/Livandi, Thesaurus of Clothing and Textile Terms, Personal Artifacts (1990)

Term_Source.Page: illustration, Vol. 2, "Vocabulary of Basic Terms for Cataloguing Costume" - ICOM International Committee.; hoods
